name: USB Storage Devices (USBSTOR)
categoryDescription: Hardware device connection history — USB storage, Bluetooth, portable devices, and imaging hardware.
description: USBSTOR enumerates every USB mass storage device connected to the system — device class, serial number, vendor/product ID, and first/last connection timestamps (via setupapi.dev.log correlation). MountedDevices maps device GUIDs to drive letters.
forensic_value: USBSTOR proves specific USB devices were connected — device serial number is globally unique and ties to purchase records. First connection via setupapi.dev.log, last connection via timestamps in the subkey. Correlate MountedDevices GUIDs with USBSTOR entries to establish which drive letter each device received.
